data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed), but the evidence provided does not include any information about the counter/window entity or its states. The prior step evidence confirms various functionalities but lacks specific details on the counter lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive result. The previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1) was also blocked due to insufficient evidence, indicating a consistent gap in the necessary data.
gaps: No evidence of counter/window entity scoped to location/queue.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
